creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Missing are entries for:

  Mike Karels (see https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/access?h=refs/internal/admin&id=3017b37a8318f19bad71774b39e5a2eb775a8158)

  Hans-Petter Selasky (see https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/access?h=refs/internal/admin&id=fd6d653a653441c2955f8d8757f3d8be8ea0584c)

There may be others that I do not know of since the last time this file was updated.
